title: Stainless Steel Casserole Dish with Lid – Induction Hob Cooking Pots Set – Non Stick Dutch Oven – 20cm 2.7L & 24cm 4.3L (2 Pots + 2 Glass Lids) – by Nuovva
features: PREMIUM 4PC CASSEROLE SET: The stainless steel set by Nuovva includes two casserole pots (20cm 2.7L and 24cm 4.3L) with matching glass lids, ideal for simmering, boiling, stewing, and slow cooking. A perfect choice for everyday meals and special occasions!

DURABLE TRI-PLY STAINLESS STEEL: Compiled with three layers (304 stainless steel + aluminium + 430 stainless steel) for rapid, even heat distribution and long-lasting durability. Our polished stainless steel exterior adds a sleek, modern touch to any kitchen!

CLEAR GLASS LIDS: See-through lids allow for easy watching while cooking, helping to retain heat and moisture for enhanced flavours. The glass lids feature stainless steel knobs ensuring stability and a secure grip!

COMFORTABLE HANDLES: Ergonomically designed handles on the Nuovva stainless steel casserole pots are securely riveted for a firm, locked grip. Aimed to stay touchable on the stovetop, ensuring safe and comfortable handling while cooking!

EASY MAINTENANCE: Works with all types of stovetops, including induction, gas, electric, and open flame! Our satin-polished finish resists everyday stains and rusting and makes cleaning effortless, plus it’s dishwasher safe for added convenience!

Even heat distribution The precision-engineered tri-ply base eliminates hot spots, ensuring perfectly balanced heat for accurate, reliable cooking. Naturally Non-Stick Surface The satin-polished stainless steel interior offers excellent food release and effortless cleanup—no coating required. Oven-Ready Performance Move seamlessly from hob to oven with confidence—built to handle high temperatures for all-in-one cooking convenience.
